output.answer:
The earliest release date for "You'll Never Walk Alone" in the provided results is **1945-01-01**. This corresponds to its original release in the 1945 musical *Carousel*.

<answer>
1945-01-01
</answer>
output.formatted:
The earliest release date for "You'll Never Walk Alone" in the provided results is **1945-01-01**. This corresponds to its original release in the 1945 musical *Carousel*.

<answer>
1945-01-01

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?releaseDate WHERE {
  ?item rdfs:label "You'll Never Walk Alone" @en .
  ?item wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 6 rows and 1 column:
| releaseDate                         |
| ----------------------------------- |
| 1954-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 2020-12-03T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1971-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1945-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1962-09-17T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 2020-04-02T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
